name: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal or hide associated sections of content. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.

props.name: children
props.description: AccordionItem elements to render inside the accordion.

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Position of the expand/collapse arrow icon.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initially expanded item(s) for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all accordion items.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Keep collapsed item content mounted in the DOM.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allows multiple items to be expanded simultaneously.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Callback fired when expanded state changes.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of accordion items.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled expanded item value(s).

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style of the accordion border.

examples:
import {Accordion} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Accordion>
  <Accordion.Item value="item1" title="Section 1">
    Content for section 1
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item value="item2" title="Section 2">
    Content for section 2
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>

const [value, setValue] = React.useState('');

<Accordion value={value} onUpdate={setValue}>
  <Accordion.Item value="a" title="Item A">Content A</Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item value="b" title="Item B">Content B</Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>

name: ActionsPanel
description: A floating panel that displays a set of actions, typically used for bulk operations on selected items. Renders at the bottom of a container.

props.name: actions
props.description: Array of actions or action groups to display in the panel.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: maxRowActions
props.description: Maximum number of action buttons to show before collapsing into a dropdown.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback to close/dismiss the panel.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: renderNote
props.description: Renders additional note content inside the panel.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

name: ActionTooltip
description: A tooltip designed for action triggers such as icon buttons. Displays a title, optional description, and optional keyboard shortcut hotkey.

props.name: children
props.description: The trigger element the tooltip is attached to.

props.name: title
props.description: Main label shown in the tooltip.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip closes after the trigger loses hover.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional descriptive text shown below the title.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Keyboard shortcut displayed at the bottom of the tooltip.

props.name: id
props.description: ID for the tooltip element.

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip opens after hover.

props.name: placement
props.description: Placement of the tooltip relative to the trigger.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

examples:
import {ActionTooltip, Button, Icon} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';
import {Gear} from '@gravity-ui/icons';

<ActionTooltip title="Settings" hotkey="Ctrl+,">
  <Button view="flat">
    <Icon data={Gear} />
  </Button>
</ActionTooltip>

name: Alert
description: Displays an inline notification or feedback message with optional icon, title, message body, and action buttons. Supports multiple themes and visual variants.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons or custom content rendered at the bottom of the alert.

props.name: align
props.description: Vertical alignment of icon and content.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: corners
props.description: Controls border radius of the alert.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon element to display. Overrides the default theme icon.

props.name: layout
props.description: Arrangement of the alert icon and text content.

props.name: message
props.description: Main body text of the alert.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback when the dismiss button is clicked. Shows the dismiss button when provided.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color theme of the alert.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading text displayed at the top of the alert.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style variant of the alert.

examples:
import {Alert} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Alert
  theme="info"
  title="Information"
  message="Your session will expire in 5 minutes."
/>

<Alert
  theme="danger"
  title="Error"
  message="Failed to save changes."
  onClose={() => setVisible(false)}
/>

name: ArrowToggle
description: A simple animated arrow icon that rotates to indicate an open or closed state, commonly used in dropdowns and expandable sections.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction the arrow points.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the arrow icon in pixels.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {ArrowToggle} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<ArrowToggle direction="top" size={16} />

name: Avatar
description: Displays a user avatar using an image, icon, or initials. Supports multiple sizes, themes, shapes, and can be rendered as a button or link.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the avatar image.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Custom background color for icon or text avatars.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Custom border color for the avatar.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: color
props.description: Custom icon or text color.

props.name: fallbackImgUrl
props.description: Fallback image URL when the primary image fails to load.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon data to render inside the avatar.

props.name: imgUrl
props.description: URL of the avatar image.

props.name: loading
props.description: Image loading behavior.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: shape
props.description: Shape of the avatar.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the avatar.

props.name: srcSet
props.description: Responsive image source set.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: text
props.description: Text to display as initials inside the avatar.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color theme for icon and text avatars.

props.name: title
props.description: Tooltip text for the avatar element.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style variant.

examples:
import {Avatar} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Avatar imgUrl="https://example.com/photo.jpg" size="m" alt="Jane Doe" />
<Avatar text="John Smith" size="l" theme="brand" />

name: AvatarStack
description: Renders a horizontal stack of overlapping Avatar components. Automatically collapses excess avatars into a count indicator or dots.

props.name: children
props.description: Avatar elements to stack.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of avatars to show before collapsing.

props.name: moreVariant
props.description: Display style for the overflow indicator.

props.name: overlapSize
props.description: Amount of overlap between adjacent avatars.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: renderMore
props.description: Custom renderer for the overflow indicator element.

props.name: size
props.description: Size passed to all child Avatar components.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: total
props.description: Total count used when computing overflow (defaults to children count).

examples:
import {Avatar, AvatarStack} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<AvatarStack max={3} size="m">
  <Avatar text="Alice" />
  <Avatar text="Bob" />
  <Avatar text="Carol" />
  <Avatar text="Dave" />
</AvatarStack>

name: Breadcrumbs
description: Displays a navigation trail showing the user's current location within a hierarchy. Automatically collapses middle items into a popup when there are too many to display.

props.name: children
props.description: BreadcrumbsItem elements representing each level of the hierarchy.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction on all breadcrumb items.

props.name: endContent
props.description: Content rendered after the last breadcrumb item.

props.name: itemComponent
props.description: Custom component used to render each breadcrumb item.

props.name: maxItems
props.description: Maximum number of breadcrumb items to show before collapsing.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Callback when a breadcrumb item is clicked.

props.name: popupPlacement
props.description: Placement of the collapsed items popup.

props.name: popupStyle
props.description: Inline styles for the overflow popup.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: separator
props.description: Custom separator element between breadcrumb items.

props.name: showRoot
props.description: Always show the first (root) breadcrumb item even when collapsing.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Breadcrumbs} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Breadcrumbs>
  <Breadcrumbs.Item href="/">Home</Breadcrumbs.Item>
  <Breadcrumbs.Item href="/products">Products</Breadcrumbs.Item>
  <Breadcrumbs.Item>Details</Breadcrumbs.Item>
</Breadcrumbs>

name: Button
description: A versatile interactive button component. Supports multiple visual styles, sizes, pin shapes, loading state, and can render as a link.

props.name: children
props.description: Content inside the button, typically text and/or icons.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: component
props.description: Custom component to render as the button root (e.g., a router Link).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button, preventing interaction.

props.name: extraProps
props.description: Additional HTML attributes passed to the root element.

props.name: href
props.description: URL to navigate to. When provided, renders an anchor element.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner and disables interaction.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click event handler.

props.name: pin
props.description: Controls the border radius of each side (start-end).

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: rel
props.description: rel HTML attribute for link buttons.

props.name: selected
props.description: Marks the button as selected/active.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the button.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: target
props.description: target HTML attribute for link buttons.

props.name: title
props.description: Native tooltip text.

props.name: type
props.description: HTML button type attribute.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style variant of the button.

props.name: width
props.description: Width behavior: auto fits content, max fills the container.

examples:
import {Button} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Button view="action" size="m" onClick={() => console.log('clicked')}>
  Submit
</Button>

name: Card
description: A container component that groups related content with a visual boundary. Supports selection, action, and container types with various visual styles.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the card.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction for selection and action cards.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for action-type cards.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: selected
props.description: Marks the card as selected. Applies to selection-type cards.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the card padding.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color theme of the card.

props.name: type
props.description: Semantic type of the card. Determines interaction behavior.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style variant of the card.

examples:
import {Card} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

Card content goes here

<Card
  type="selection"
  selected={isSelected}
  onClick={() => setSelected(!isSelected)}
>
  Click to select
</Card>

name: Checkbox
description: A form checkbox input that supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, an indeterminate state, and optional label content.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: content
props.description: Label content rendered next to the checkbox.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the checkbox.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute for the input element.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Renders the checkbox in an indeterminate state.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Native change event handler.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Callback with the new boolean checked value.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the checkbox.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: title
props.description: Native tooltip text.

props.name: value
props.description: Value attribute of the underlying input element.

examples: <Checkbox indeterminate content="Select all" />

name: ClipboardButton
description: A button that copies a specified text to the clipboard and provides visual feedback via a tooltip that changes on success.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to copy to the clipboard.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: hasTooltip
props.description: Whether to show a tooltip on hover.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon element.

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Position of the icon relative to the button content.

props.name: onCopy
props.description: Callback fired after the copy operation completes.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the button.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: timeout
props.description: Duration in milliseconds to show the success state.

props.name: tooltipInitialText
props.description: Tooltip text shown before copying.

props.name: tooltipSuccessText
props.description: Tooltip text shown after successful copy.

examples:
import {ClipboardButton} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<ClipboardButton text="https://example.com" />

name: ClipboardIcon
description: An icon that animates between clipboard and checkmark states to represent the clipboard copy operation status.

props.name: status
props.description: Current state of the copy operation.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the icon in pixels.

examples:
import {ClipboardIcon} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<ClipboardIcon status="success" size={16} />

name: CopyToClipboard
description: A headless component that provides clipboard copy functionality via a render prop pattern. Manages copy status and exposes it to the children function.

props.name: children
props.description: Render function receiving the current copy status.

props.name: text
props.description: Text to copy. Can be a static string or a function that returns a string.

props.name: onCopy
props.description: Callback fired after the copy operation.

props.name: timeout
props.description: Duration in milliseconds before status resets to pending.

name: DefinitionList
description: Displays a structured list of term-definition pairs. Supports vertical and horizontal layouts, responsive mode, and optional copy-to-clipboard per item.

props.name: children
props.description: DefinitionList.Item elements.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: contentMaxWidth
props.description: Maximum width in pixels for the definition (value) column.

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout direction of term-definition pairs.

props.name: nameMaxWidth
props.description: Maximum width in pixels for the term (name) column.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Enables responsive layout that switches direction on small screens.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {DefinitionList} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<DefinitionList direction="horizontal">
  <DefinitionList.Item name="Name">John Doe</DefinitionList.Item>
  <DefinitionList.Item name="Email" copyText="john@example.com">
    john@example.com
  </DefinitionList.Item>
</DefinitionList>

name: Dialog
description: A modal dialog with a structured layout of header, body, and footer sections. Built on top of Modal with a close button and standard slot components.

props.name: children
props.description: Dialog content — typically Dialog.Header, Dialog.Body, and Dialog.Footer.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback to close the dialog.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls dialog visibility.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: contentOverflow
props.description: Controls scrolling behavior inside the dialog.

props.name: disableBodyScrollLock
props.description: Disables the body scroll lock when dialog is open.

props.name: disableEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Prevents closing the dialog on Escape key press.

props.name: disableOutsideClick
props.description: Prevents closing the dialog when clicking outside.

props.name: hasCloseButton
props.description: Shows a close button in the top-right corner.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Keep the dialog mounted in the DOM when closed.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Width preset for the dialog.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Dialog, Button} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} size="s">
  <Dialog.Header caption="Confirm action" />
  <Dialog.Body>Are you sure you want to delete this item?</Dialog.Body>
  <Dialog.Footer
    onClickButtonApply={() => { handleDelete(); setOpen(false); }}
    onClickButtonCancel={() => setOpen(false)}
    textButtonApply="Delete"
    textButtonCancel="Cancel"
  />
</Dialog>

name: Disclosure
description: A collapsible section with a summary trigger and expandable content area. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Position of the expand arrow icon.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Initial expanded state for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the toggle interaction.

props.name: expanded
props.description: Controlled expanded state.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Keep content mounted when collapsed.

props.name: onSummaryKeyDown
props.description: Key down event handler on the summary element.

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Callback fired when the expanded state changes.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the disclosure trigger.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: summary
props.description: Content for the always-visible trigger area.

examples:
import {Disclosure} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Disclosure summary="Show more details">
  Here is the expanded content that was hidden.
</Disclosure>

name: Divider
description: A thin horizontal or vertical line used to separate sections of content. Supports an optional label and alignment.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the optional label within the divider.

props.name: children
props.description: Optional label text or element displayed within the divider line.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Orientation of the divider line.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Divider} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Divider align="center">OR</Divider>
<Divider orientation="vertical" />

name: Drawer
description: A sliding panel that appears from the edge of the screen. Supports left, right, top, and bottom placement, optional resizing, and backdrop dismissal.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls drawer visibility.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: hideVeil
props.description: Hides the backdrop overlay behind the drawer.

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum size in pixels when resizable.

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size in pixels when resizable.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when the open state changes.

props.name: onResizeComplete
props.description: Callback fired when a resize drag operation completes.

props.name: onResizeStart
props.description: Callback fired when a resize drag operation starts.

props.name: placement
props.description: Edge from which the drawer slides in.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: resizable
props.description: Enables drag-to-resize functionality.

props.name: size
props.description: Initial size of the drawer in pixels or auto.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Drawer, Button} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

Settings

name: DropdownMenu
description: A button that opens a dropdown menu with a list of actions. Supports nested submenus, icons, disabled items, and a custom switcher trigger.

props.name: children
props.description: Alternative to items — use DropdownMenu.Item elements as children.

props.name: data
props.description: Extra data passed to item handler callbacks.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the menu trigger button.

props.name: hideOnScroll
props.description: Closes the menu when the page is scrolled.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon for the default ellipsis trigger button.

props.name: items
props.description: Menu items array. Use nested arrays to create groups separated by dividers.

props.name: onOpenToggle
props.description: Callback when the open state changes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state of the menu.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: renderSwitcher
props.description: Custom render function for the trigger button.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the trigger button and menu items.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
<DropdownMenu
  items={[
    [{text: 'Copy'}, {text: 'Paste'}],
    [{text: 'Delete', theme: 'danger'}],
  ]}
/>

name: FilePreview
description: Displays a preview tile for a file with its name, type icon or image thumbnail, and optional action buttons. Used in file upload UIs.

props.name: file
props.description: The File object representing the file to preview.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action buttons shown on hover over the preview tile.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: description
props.description: Additional descriptive text shown below the file name.

props.name: imageSrc
props.description: URL of an image to show as a thumbnail preview.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback when the preview tile is clicked.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: selected
props.description: Marks the preview as selected.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: view
props.description: Size variant of the preview tile.

name: HelpMark
description: A small question mark button that shows a popover with help content when clicked or hovered. Used for inline contextual help.

props.name: children
props.description: Content displayed inside the popover.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Additional HTML attributes for the trigger button.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Size of the question mark icon: s=14px, m=16px, l=18px, xl=20px.

props.name: popoverProps
props.description: Props passed through to the underlying Popover component.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {HelpMark, Text} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<HelpMark>
  This field requires a valid email address.
</HelpMark>

name: Hotkey
description: Renders a keyboard shortcut visually as individual key badges. Handles platform-specific key symbols for Mac and PC.

props.name: value
props.description: Keyboard shortcut string, e.g. 'mod+k' or 'ctrl+shift+p'.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: platform
props.description: Platform for key symbol rendering. Defaults to auto-detect from user agent.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual theme of the key badges.

examples:
import {Hotkey} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Hotkey value="mod+k" />

name: Icon
description: Renders an SVG icon from the Gravity UI icon set. Accepts icon data and supports size, color, and fill/stroke overrides.

props.name: data
props.description: SVG icon data imported from @gravity-ui/icons or a custom SVG component.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: color
props.description: CSS color value applied to the icon.

props.name: fill
props.description: SVG fill attribute override.

props.name: height
props.description: Explicit height override.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets both width and height of the icon in pixels.

props.name: stroke
props.description: SVG stroke attribute override.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: width
props.description: Explicit width override.

name: Label
description: A small tag or badge component used to display metadata, statuses, or categories. Supports copy, close, and info interaction types.

props.name: children
props.description: Label text content.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: copyText
props.description: Text to copy when type is 'copy'.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element to display at the start of the label.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Makes the label appear clickable even when no onClick is provided.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner inside the label.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the label body.

props.name: onCloseClick
props.description: Click handler for the close button when type is 'close'.

props.name: onCopy
props.description: Callback after copy when type is 'copy'.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the label.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color theme of the label.

props.name: type
props.description: Interaction type of the label.

props.name: value
props.description: Secondary text value shown after a colon separator.

props.name: width
props.description: Width behavior of the label.

examples:
import {Label} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Label theme="success">Active</Label>
<Label type="copy" copyText="abc123" value="abc123">ID</Label>

name: Link
description: A styled anchor element for navigation. Supports multiple visual variants and optional visited state styling.

props.name: href
props.description: URL the link navigates to.

props.name: children
props.description: Link text or content.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: href
props.description: URL for the link.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click event handler.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: rel
props.description: rel HTML attribute.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

props.name: target
props.description: target HTML attribute.

props.name: title
props.description: Native tooltip text.

props.name: underline
props.description: Shows underline on the link text.

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style variant of the link.

props.name: visitable
props.description: Enables visited state styling.

examples:
import {Link} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Link href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  Visit Example
</Link>

name: List
description: A performant list component supporting virtual scrolling, filtering, sorting, and custom item rendering. Used for long lists and select-like interfaces.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of items to render in the list.

props.name: activeItemIndex
props.description: Index of the keyboard-focused item.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: deactivateOnLeave
props.description: Clears the active item when the mouse leaves the list.

props.name: emptyPlaceholder
props.description: Content shown when the items array is empty or filter returns no results.

props.name: filter
props.description: Controlled filter value.

props.name: filterItem
props.description: Custom predicate for filtering items.

props.name: filterPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the filter input.

props.name: filterable
props.description: Enables a built-in text filter input above the list.

props.name: id
props.description: id HTML attribute.

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: CSS class applied to each item wrapper.

props.name: itemHeight
props.description: Height of each item in pixels. Required for virtualization.

props.name: itemsClassName
props.description: CSS class for the items container.

props.name: itemsHeight
props.description: Total height of the items container.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading indicator.

props.name: onChangeActive
props.description: Callback when the active item index changes.

props.name: onItemClick
props.description: Callback when an item is clicked.

props.name: onLoadMore
props.description: Callback fired when scrolled near the bottom for infinite loading.

props.name: onSortEnd
props.description: Callback after drag-to-sort completes.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: renderItem
props.type: (item: T, isActive: boolean, itemIndex: number) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Custom renderer for each list item.

props.name: role
props.description: ARIA role for the list element.

props.name: selectedItemIndex
props.description: Index or indices of selected items.

props.name: sortHandleAlign
props.description: Alignment of the drag sort handle.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enables drag-to-reorder functionality.

props.name: virtualized
props.description: Enables virtual scrolling for large lists.

name: Loader
description: An animated spinner used to indicate a loading state. Comes in three sizes.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the spinner.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Loader} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Loader size="m" />

name: Menu
description: A vertical list of menu items with optional grouping. Provides Menu.Item for individual actions and Menu.Group for labeled sections.

props.name: children
props.description: Menu.Item and Menu.Group elements.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the root element.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the menu and its items.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the root element.

examples:
import {Menu} from '@gravity-ui/uikit';

<Menu>
  <Menu.Item onClick={() => handleEdit()}>Edit</Menu.Item>
  <Menu.Group label="Danger Zone">
    <Menu.Item theme="danger" onClick={() => handleDelete()}>Delete</Menu.Item>
  </Menu.Group>
</Menu>

name: Modal
description: A base modal overlay component that renders content above the page with a backdrop. Manages focus trapping, scroll locking, and dismiss interactions.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the modal.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the overlay element.

props.name: container
props.description: DOM element to mount the modal via Portal. Defaults to document.body.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the inner content element.

props.name: contentOverflow
props.description: Controls scroll behavior inside the modal content.

props.name: disableBodyScrollLock
props.description: Disables locking page scroll while the modal is open.

props.name: disableEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Prevents dismissal on Escape key press.

props.name: disableHeightTransition
props.description: Disables animated height transitions.

props.name: disableOutsideClick
props.description: Prevents dismissal on clicks outside the modal content.

props.name: disablePortal
props.description: Renders modal inline instead of via a Portal.

props.name: disableVisuallyHiddenDismiss
props.description: Suppresses the visually hidden accessibility dismiss buttons.

props.name: floatingRef
props.description: Ref attached to the floating content element.

props.name: initialFocus
props.description: Element or index to focus initially when the modal opens.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Keep the modal DOM tree mounted when closed.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Deprecated: use onOpenChange instead. Callback for close events.

props.name: onEnterKeyDown
props.description: Deprecated: callback when Enter is pressed inside the modal.

props.name: onEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Deprecated: use onOpenChange instead. Callback when Escape is pressed.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.type: (open: boolean, event?: Event, reason?: string) => void
props.description: Callback when the open state changes.

props.name: onOutsideClick
props.description: Deprecated: use onOpenChange instead. Callback for outside clicks.

props.name: onTransitionIn
props.description: Callback when the open transition starts.

props.name: onTransitionInComplete
props.description: Callback when the open transition completes.

props.name: onTransitionOut
props.description: Callback when the close transition starts.

props.name: onTransitionOutComplete
props.description: Callback when the close transition completes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls modal visibility.

props.name: qa
props.description: data-qa attribute for testing.

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: Element to return focus to when modal closes.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles for the overlay element.

examples:
import {Modal, Button} from '@gravity-ui/uikit'; const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false); <>

Modal content
